dungeon: ROTF marathon (1836 frames, ~194 entries; SAMPLED) — dominated by ASGARD farming. Loki trickster taunt set (NEW), Heimdall/Odin lines, Gjallahorn + Hela's Essence items, Galactic Zones live. GENUINE ROTF.
source: video disc__1He_TVKDuw (HUGE: 1836 f_, 2754 chat, 1377 minimap, 582 transitions = ~194 entries). Sampled (25 transitions + 18 chat). The DOMINANT farmed dungeon (recurring green-grass + purple-tile CROSS courtyard with a gold SUN-DISK medallion center) = ASGARD (consistent with the flood of Asgard-god taunts: Loki/Odin/Heimdall/Thor/Hela). Other biomes: sandstone, blue water, red-brick maze, grey labyrinths.

bosses.name: Loki
taunts: I will disappear now! Or will I! Hahahaha!
I was invisible! Are you cheating!
You seem to be still alive.
bosses.note: DOCUMENTED-from-chat. BIG ENRICHMENT for the built Asgard Loki (BehaviorDb.Asgard.cs currently only 'Don't fall for my tricks!'/'Why are you still alive? Die!'). Loki has an INVISIBILITY/disappear mechanic + mocking taunts. ('Now you see me! Now you die!' also seen but attribution to Loki uncertain.)

bosses.name: Heimdall

bosses.note: DOCUMENTED-from-chat. The FULL version of the 'Let the sound penetrate...' line added this session -> consider updating built Heimdall to 'The sound will penetrate your mind!' (Gjallarhorn).
